ValidationRule.description: Prevents users from setting Meeting Status to "Meeting Held" unless Meeting Date is populated, is a past date, and Client Questionnaire is completed.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISPICKVAL(Meeting_Status__c, "Meeting Held"), OR( ISBLANK(Target_Meeting_Date__c), Target_Meeting_Date__c > TODAY(), NOT(Client_Questionnaire_Completed__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: To set Meeting Status to "Meeting Held", Meeting Date must be populated, be a past date, and the Client Questionnaire must be completed.
